zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillem II de Montcada於1134年之前出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿蒙卡達 I 萊薩時，他的父親Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona47歲，母親Beatriz de Montcada34歲。他於1164年6月10日之前與Vicomtésse Marie de Gabarret-Guiscarda-Béarn結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1172年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillem II de Montcada于1134年之前出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿蒙卡達 I 萊薩时，他的父亲Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona47岁，母亲Beatriz de Montcada34岁。他于1164年6月10日之前与Vicomtésse Marie de Gabarret-Guiscarda-Béarn结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1172年。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montcada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan: variant of Montcada, a habitational name from any of the places so named in Valencia and Catalonia.

nameMeanings.name: Guillem
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: When Guillem II de Montcada was born before 1134, in Montcada i Reixac, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, his father, Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona, was 47 and his mother, Beatriz de Montcada, was 34. He married Vicomtésse Marie de Gabarret-Guiscarda-Béarn before 10 June 1164. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1172.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillem II de Montcada est né avant 1134, à Montcada i Reixac, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne, son père, Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Beatriz de Montcada, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Vicomtésse Marie de Gabarret-Guiscarda-Béarn avant 10 juin 1164. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1172.

Er hat vor 10. Juni 1164 Vicomtésse Marie de Gabarret-Guiscarda-Béarn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1172.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillem II de Montcadaが1134年以前にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナモントカダ イ レイクサックで生まれた時，父Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelonaは47歳，母Beatriz de Montcadaは34歳であった。1164年6月10日以前にVicomtésse Marie de Gabarret-Guiscarda-Béarnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1172年に死去した。

ko.Montcada i Reixac, Barcelona, Catalonia,: 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 몽카다 이 레이스악
ko.Montcada i Reixac, Barcelona, Cataluña,: 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 몽카다 이 레이스악
ko.lifeSummary: Guillem II de Montcada(이)가 1134년 이전 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 몽카다 이 레이스악에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatriz de Montcada(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1164년 6월 10일 이전 Vicomtésse Marie de Gabarret-Guiscarda-Béarn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1172년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillem II de Montcada nasceu antes 1134, em Montcada i Reixac, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha, seu pai, Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Beatriz de Montcada, tinha 34 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillem II de Montcada родился перед 1134 г. в местности монткада и риксак, барселона, каталуня, Испания, его отцу по имени Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatriz de Montcada, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Vicomtésse Marie de Gabarret-Guiscarda-Béarn перед 10 июнь 1164 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1172 г.

Se casó con Vicomtésse Marie de Gabarret-Guiscarda-Béarn antes de 10 de junio de 1164. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1172.
